{{CargoRelic
|name=Super Gene Certificate
|class_id=20491
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=For people who have the Super Gene, life is a walk in the park. Super Gene Corp favors Travelers with exceptional talents. Tailoring a specific set of personal growth project, seeking to best increase their DNA during every stage, paving a solid foundation for their exorcism!
|fame=30
|art=14
|fth=17
|civ=15
|tech=14
|ss1=Per Form Unlocked, Snail ATK +6<br>Forms Unlocked: 6/6
|ss2=Per Form Unlocked, Snail ATK +12<br>Forms Unlocked: 6/6
|ss3=Per Form Unlocked, Snail ATK +18<br>Forms Unlocked: 6/6
|ss4=Per Form Unlocked, Snail ATK +18<br>Forms Unlocked: 6/6
|ss7=Per Form Unlocked, Snail ATK +18<br>Forms Unlocked: 6/6<br> (Awakened)
}}
